title: Keep raw meats separated from other foods: video - Canada.ca
content:
## Keep raw meats separated from other foods: video
With described video
Current position: 00:00:00
Total time: --:--:--

## Transcript - Keep them separated
Two reusable grocery bags come marching in from the right: a green one without a label and a black with the label “meat” written on it.
A cauliflower spins in.  Peppers and tomatoes “march” in and encircle the cauliflower.
Vegetables keep moving as various meat packages come “marching” in.
The vegetables fall into the green bag while the meat falls into the black one.
Keep your raw meat separate from
Ready to eat foods and produce.
Food safety is in your hands
Clean • Separate • Cook • Chill
Canada.ca/FoodSafety
A message from Health Canada and the Government of Canada
